title: Thandi and the Magic School Shoes
synopsis: When Thandi finds magical shoes in her classroom closet, she discovers they can make her hop like a bunny, swim like a fish, and fly like a bird. But during show-and-tell, the shoes go wild! Can Thandi learn to control the magic and save the day?

pages.text: Thandi loved school. She had curly hair and wore a bright yellow dress. Today was Monday, and she was excited! 'Good morning, Mrs. Chen,' said Thandi. Her teacher smiled. 'Good morning, Thandi. Please hang up your coat.'

illustration.description: A cheerful Black girl with curly hair in a bright yellow dress walking into a colorful classroom. She's waving at her Asian teacher who has kind eyes and is wearing a blue cardigan. The classroom has rainbow decorations and morning sunlight streaming through windows.
illustration.alt: Thandi greeting her teacher in the classroom

pages.text: Thandi went to the coat closet. Behind the winter boots, she saw something sparkly. 'Oh my!' she whispered. There were the most beautiful shoes ever! They were silver with rainbow stripes. They seemed to glow softly.

illustration.description: Close-up of magical silver shoes with rainbow stripes glowing softly in a dark closet. Thandi's surprised face peeks into frame with wide, amazed eyes. The shoes shimmer with fairy-tale magic, casting colorful light on winter coats and boots around them.
illustration.alt: Magical glowing shoes hidden in the school closet

pages.text: Thandi looked around. No one was watching. She slipped off her regular shoes. The magic shoes fit perfectly! Suddenly, she felt very bouncy. 'These shoes are special,' she thought. Very special indeed!

illustration.description: Thandi sitting on a small chair putting on the magical shoes. Her expression shows wonder and excitement with big sparkling eyes. The shoes glow brightly on her feet while her old shoes sit nearby. The scene has warm, magical lighting.
illustration.alt: Thandi trying on the magical shoes

pages.text: At recess, Thandi went outside with her friends. There was Marcus, who had red hair and freckles. And Aisha, who wore purple glasses. 'Let's play tag!' said Marcus. Thandi nodded. She felt ready for anything!

illustration.description: Three children on a playground - Thandi in her magical shoes, Marcus (a boy with red hair and freckles), and Aisha (a girl wearing purple glasses). They're standing on green grass with playground equipment in the background. All three look happy and energetic.
illustration.alt: Thandi and her friends at recess

pages.text: Marcus started chasing Thandi. She began to run, but something amazing happened! Thandi started hopping like a bunny! Hop, hop, hop! She jumped so high and so far! 'Wow!' shouted Aisha. 'How did you do that?'

illustration.description: Thandi mid-hop in the air, her curly hair bouncing, with a joyful expression and arms spread wide. The magical shoes glow as she leaps unusually high. Marcus and Aisha watch in amazement below with their mouths open in surprise.
illustration.alt: Thandi hopping high in the air like a bunny

pages.text: After recess, they had PE class. Coach Rodriguez took them to the pool. When Thandi jumped in, she could swim like a fish! She zoomed through the water super fast. Then during art class, she floated up to reach the tall shelves!

illustration.description: A split scene showing Thandi swimming incredibly fast underwater with a huge smile (fish swimming nearby), and then floating in the air reaching for art supplies on high shelves. Coach Rodriguez (a Latino man) and other diverse children watch in amazement. The magical shoes glow underwater and in the air.
illustration.alt: Thandi swimming like a fish and floating in art class

pages.text: It was time for show and tell. Thandi raised her hand. 'I want to show my magic shoes!' she said. Mrs. Chen smiled. 'That sounds wonderful, Thandi. Please come up front.' Thandi walked to the front of the class.

illustration.description: Thandi standing at the front of the classroom with her hand raised, beaming with excitement. Mrs. Chen stands nearby encouraging her. The diverse classroom has children of different backgrounds sitting on a colorful carpet, all looking interested and engaged.
illustration.alt: Thandi volunteering for show and tell

pages.text: 'These shoes are magic!' Thandi announced. She tried to hop like a bunny. But oh no! The shoes started spinning her around! She spun like a top! 'Whoa!' cried Thandi. The children giggled, but Thandi felt dizzy!

illustration.description: Thandi spinning rapidly in circles at the front of the classroom, her yellow dress and curly hair whirling around. Her expression shows surprise and dizziness. The magical shoes are glowing wildly. Children in the background are giggling and pointing while Mrs. Chen looks concerned.
illustration.alt: Thandi spinning out of control during show and tell

pages.text: The shoes wouldn't stop! Now Thandi was floating toward the ceiling! 'Help!' she called. Mrs. Chen looked worried. 'Everyone stay calm,' said the teacher. But how could they help Thandi get down from way up there?

illustration.description: Thandi floating near the classroom ceiling with a worried expression, reaching down toward her classmates. Mrs. Chen and the diverse group of children are looking up with concern and amazement. The magical shoes glow intensely while classroom decorations and hanging mobiles surround floating Thandi.
illustration.alt: Thandi floating helplessly near the ceiling

pages.text: Thandi closed her eyes. She thought very hard about her feet. 'Please, magic shoes,' she whispered. 'Help me come down safely.' She believed in herself. She believed in the magic too.

illustration.description: Close-up of Thandi floating with her eyes closed in concentration, hands pressed together as if making a wish. Golden magical energy swirls around her and the glowing shoes. Her expression is peaceful and determined despite being high in the air.
illustration.alt: Thandi concentrating to control the magic

pages.text: Slowly, gently, Thandi floated down. The shoes stopped glowing so brightly. Her feet touched the ground softly. 'You did it!' cheered Marcus. 'That was amazing!' said Aisha. Everyone clapped for Thandi.

illustration.description: Thandi gracefully touching down on the classroom carpet with a relieved and proud smile. Her classmates - Marcus, Aisha, and other diverse children - are clapping and cheering with big smiles. Mrs. Chen beams proudly in the background. The shoes now glow softly and peacefully.
illustration.alt: Thandi safely landing as everyone cheers

pages.text: After school, Thandi put the magic shoes back in the closet. 'Thank you for the adventure,' she whispered to them. Tomorrow, maybe another child would find them. Magic should be shared with everyone!

illustration.description: Thandi gently placing the magical shoes back in the closet, patting them goodbye with a tender smile. The shoes glow warmly as if saying goodbye back. The closet is softly lit with magical sparkles floating around the shoes, suggesting they're ready for the next adventure.
illustration.alt: Thandi returning the magic shoes to the closet

pages.text: Thandi walked home with a big smile. She had learned something important today. Magic is wonderful, but the best magic comes from believing in yourself. And sharing adventures with friends makes everything more fun!

illustration.description: Thandi walking happily down a tree-lined street toward home, her regular shoes on her feet and her school backpack bouncing. The sun is setting with warm orange and pink colors in the sky. Her expression shows contentment and joy as she reflects on her magical day.
illustration.alt: Thandi walking home happily after her magical day

pages.text: That night, Thandi told her mom and dad about her day. 'What an adventure!' said Mom. 'You were very brave,' said Dad. Thandi hugged them tight. Tomorrow would be another wonderful day at school. She couldn't wait!

illustration.description: A cozy living room scene with Thandi hugging her parents - her mom (a Black woman with natural hair) and dad (a Black man with glasses) - on a comfortable sofa. The room has warm lighting and family photos on the walls. All three have loving, content expressions as they share the bedtime story.
illustration.alt: Thandi hugging her parents at home

metadata.illustrationStyle: Playful storybook illustration style. Rich saturated colors. Expressive characters with big eyes. Whimsical, like Pixar concept art.

questions.question: Where did Thandi find the magic shoes?
questions.explanation: Thandi found the magic shoes behind the winter boots in the coat closet at school.

questions.question: What happened when Thandi tried to show off the shoes?
questions.explanation: During show and tell, the magic shoes went wild and started spinning Thandi around and making her float to the ceiling.

questions.question: How did Thandi get the shoes under control?
choices: She closed her eyes and concentrated
questions.explanation: Thandi closed her eyes and concentrated, believing in herself and asking the shoes to help her come down safely.

questions.question: Who are Thandi's friends?
questions.explanation: Thandi's friends are Marcus, who has red hair and freckles, and Aisha, who wears purple glasses.

questions.question: What did Thandi do with the shoes at the end?
choices: Put them back in the closet
questions.explanation: Thandi put the magic shoes back in the closet so that another child might find them, because she believed magic should be shared.

pages.title: Complete the Story
pages.instructions: Fill in the missing words to complete the sentences from the story!

sentences.text: Thandi found the magic _____ in the coat closet.
The shoes made her hop like a _____.
During _____ and tell, the shoes went wild!

pages.title: Magic Word Search
pages.instructions: Help Thandi find the magic words! Circle the words that describe what the shoes could do.

sentences.text: The magic shoes helped Thandi _____ through the water like a fish.
She could _____ up to reach the tall shelves.
Thandi learned that believing in _____ was the most important magic.
